# Raw news results: The 4 Cognitive Archetypes of Developers Using AI

## 1. AI use may speed code generation, but developers’ skills suffer

As companies move to more AI code writing, humans may not have the necessary skills to validate and debug the AI-written code if their skill formation was inhibited by using AI in the first place, ...

Source: DuckDuckGo News
URL: https://www.infoworld.com/article/4125231/ai-use-may-speed-code-generation-but-developers-skills-suffer.html
